query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "latentskill: from in-context textual skills to in-weight latent skills" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) by investigating the same underlying mechanism of "latent skills" (specifically, the model's internal representation and processing of sub-word character composition) that the user's question targets, even though it focuses on a specific linguistic failure mode rather than the full "In-Context to In-Weight" transfer framework.
